evals.prompt: Set up a GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline for our NestJS + React monorepo (npm workspaces). Steps: install deps, lint, type-check, test (with PostgreSQL service), build, and deploy to staging on merge to main. Use caching for node_modules.
evals.expected_output: GitHub Actions workflow YAML with all stages, PostgreSQL service container, npm cache, and staging deploy

assertions.name: workflow_yaml
assertions.description: Complete .github/workflows/ci.yml file

assertions.name: all_stages
assertions.description: lint, type-check, test, build, deploy stages present

assertions.name: postgres_service
assertions.description: PostgreSQL service container for test stage

assertions.name: npm_cache
assertions.description: Node modules cached between runs

assertions.name: deploy_on_merge
assertions.description: Deploy job triggered only on merge to main

evals.prompt: Set up a GitLab CI pipeline for our Django + Celery project. Stages: lint (ruff), test (pytest with PostgreSQL), build Docker image, push to registry, deploy to staging. Use cache for pip.
evals.expected_output: GitLab CI YAML with stages, services, cache, and deployment

assertions.name: gitlab_ci_yaml
assertions.description: Complete .gitlab-ci.yml file

assertions.name: ruff_lint
assertions.description: Lint stage uses Ruff for Python linting

assertions.name: pytest_with_db
assertions.description: Test stage uses PostgreSQL service

assertions.name: docker_build_push
assertions.description: Docker build and push to container registry

assertions.name: pip_cache
assertions.description: pip cache configured for faster installs

evals.prompt: Add a PR check workflow that runs on every pull request: lint, type-check, test, and post a coverage comment. Block merge if tests fail or coverage drops below 80%.
evals.expected_output: PR-focused workflow with status checks, coverage reporting, and merge blocking

assertions.name: pr_trigger
assertions.description: Workflow triggers on pull_request event

assertions.name: coverage_report
assertions.description: Coverage results posted as PR comment or check

assertions.name: coverage_threshold
assertions.description: 80% coverage threshold enforced

assertions.name: merge_blocking
assertions.description: Failed checks block the PR from merging

assertions.name: fast_execution
assertions.description: Optimized for PR speed (parallel jobs, caching)

evals.prompt: Set up a deployment pipeline with staging and production environments. Staging deploys automatically on merge to main. Production requires manual approval. Use GitHub Actions with environment protection rules.
evals.expected_output: Workflow with two environments, auto-deploy to staging, manual approval for production

assertions.name: two_environments
assertions.description: Staging and production environments defined

assertions.name: auto_staging
assertions.description: Staging deploys automatically on merge to main

assertions.name: manual_production
assertions.description: Production requires manual approval via GitHub environment protection

assertions.name: same_artifact
assertions.description: Same build artifact deployed to both environments

assertions.name: rollback_option
assertions.description: Ability to redeploy previous version

evals.prompt: Add a scheduled CI job that runs nightly: dependency audit (npm audit), security scan (Semgrep), and database backup verification. Send Slack notification on failure.
evals.expected_output: Scheduled workflow with cron trigger, security scanning, and Slack notifications

assertions.name: cron_schedule
assertions.description: Workflow triggered on cron schedule (nightly)

assertions.name: dep_audit
assertions.description: npm audit or similar vulnerability scan

assertions.name: security_scan
assertions.description: Semgrep or equivalent security scanning

assertions.name: slack_notification
assertions.description: Slack webhook notification on failure

assertions.name: separate_from_pr
assertions.description: Runs independently from PR pipeline
